text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, all right. I'll get some rest, so you can
stop pestering me. Night!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? What was I doing again?

text_block_list.name: Show Host
text_block_list.text: It's time for What's the Pun! Please welcome our contestant, Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right... I finally made it on to this legendary
show... right? Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Nice Nature. I'm looking forward to a great
pun battle.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I grew up entertaining people at my
mom's bar. Don't underestimate my humor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because she's dreaming, Nice Nature is
unexpectedly motivated for this pun battle—and
thus begins a fierce competition...

text_block_list.name: Show Host
text_block_list.text:
And now for the final theme to conclude this
battle—"Training!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've heard good things about marathon
training—they say it really helps you in the long
run!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, hahaha... marathon... the long run...
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Show Host
text_block_list.text:
There we have it! The legendary royal
straight—the flash gag! Tonight's winner is Nice
Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Haha, I won.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That was such a weird dream... but, I don't know...
I feel so happy for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After such a pleasant dream, Nice Nature feels
refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nooo! She was faster on the button!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Speed is the key in both races and gag battles.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... What was that dream?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the dream and its ending so cryptic, Nice
Nature is left confused.
